package.name: madara_hardware_interface
package.description: ros2_control hardware plugin for Madara 6-DoF arm. Communicates with Arduino Uno over UART using a compact binary protocol. - Joint 0 (top_plate): DC motor, encoder feedback, full position+velocity state. - Joints 1-5 (servos): open-loop, state echoes last command. - Joint 6 (left_claw): mimic = -right_claw, no actuator.
